---
description: "Audit a user request or draft ToDo list by checking ambiguity and hidden assumptions first, then shallow task breakdowns, weak goal fit, and missing user clarification."
name: "Audit ToDo Intake"
argument-hint: "Paste the user request and current ToDo or plan"
agent: "agent"
---
Audit the provided user request and proposed ToDo list.

Return the verdict and the exact clarification question if user confirmation is required because the request, assumptions, or next steps remain ambiguous, incomplete, or materially under-specified.
